{{ $in := hugo.Data.home.integrations }}

{{ $in.label }}

{{ range $in.chips }} {{- $u := .url -}} {{- $href := $u -}} {{- if findRE "#" $u 1 -}} {{- $frag := index (split $u "#") 1 -}} {{- $path := index (split $u "#") 0 -}} {{- $href = printf "%s#%s" ($path | relURL) $frag -}} {{- else -}} {{- $href = relURL $u -}} {{- end -}} {{ .text }} {{ end }}
